description_long: This is a rectangular desk with a dark brown wooden top and sturdy black metal legs, designed for stability and durability. The desk features a flat, spacious surface suitable for work or study, with a single computer monitor centrally placed on top. The legs are T-shaped, providing ample legroom and a modern, industrial aesthetic. The monitor is mounted on a circular base, positioned at the center of the desk, suggesting a dedicated workspace for digital tasks. The desk has no visible drawers, shelves, or cable management features, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design. The materials and finish suggest it is intended for high-traffic environments such as offices, libraries, or computer labs.
description: A modern rectangular desk with a dark brown wooden top, black metal T-legs, and a centrally placed computer monitor. The design is minimalist and functional, ideal for digital workspaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the desk, the flat brown surface, and the centrally positioned monitor.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the desk and the thinness of the monitor, with the T-shaped leg visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the monitor and the clean, uninterrupted desk surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the desk's depth and the monitor's side profile, with the T-leg structure visible.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the monitor screen facing outward, intended for seated use with the monitor directly in front.
